auth.twoFaDesc: To enhance your account security, we strongly recommend setting up two-factor authentication (2FA). 2FA adds an extra layer of protection by requiring a second form of verification in addition to your password.
auth.enableTwoFa: Enable 2FA: Protect your account by activating two-factor authentication, so even if your password is exposed, only you can access your account.
auth.disableTwoFa: If you do not want to use two-step verification, you can disable this feature. However, please remember that your account may become more vulnerable to unauthorized access.
auth.passwordResetLinkSent: Password reset link has been sent to your email.
auth.enterEmailToResetPassword: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

auth.passwordResetSuccessDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

auth.thankSignUpAndConfirm: Thanks for signing up. Confirm your email address

verification.title: Account Verification

banner.title: Verify Your Account
banner.subtitle: Please complete your identity and related information so we can verify your identity.

started.quizDescription: Please answer the following questions based on your actual situation. You may not proceed if requirements are not met.
started.cantProcess: Sorry, you currently do not meet the account opening requirements. Please contact support.

questions.q1: Do you have full legal capacity?
questions.q2: Do you understand the risks of leveraged products such as CFDs?
questions.q3: Do you have a stable source of funds and can bear potential losses?
questions.q4: Do you confirm that the information provided is true, complete, and valid?

verification.submitDisclaimer: By submitting this form, you authorize MDM to contact you regarding products and services we offer that may interest you. Our customer service manager will contact you shortly. Please note that your contact information will be used by MDM and will not be shared with any affiliates or third parties.
verification.financialDescription: Please provide your financial information. This section is optional.
verification.agreementDescription: Please read and agree to the following agreements to proceed with verification.

agreements.documentConfirmation: I/We confirm that I/We have received, read, understood and agree to the following documents provided by MDM:

documentList.BestExecutionPolicyforTradingCFDs: MDM Best Execution Policy for Trading CFDs

agreements.electronicIdDescription: Identity verification description. Please read the following options carefully and select your preference.
agreements.agreeElectronicId: I agree to MDM providing my information to IDV service providers for electronic identity verification. I confirm that I have the right to provide my personal information and further agree to use third-party systems to verify my identity, including verifying my name, date of birth and address (if applicable) with credit reporting agencies for electronic identity verification.
agreements.disagreeElectronicId: I do not agree to MDM providing my information to IDV service providers for electronic identity verification purposes.
agreements.disagreeElectronicIdNote: *Please prepare to mail a certified copy of your valid photo ID to your MDM sales office

consent1.title: User Agreement
consent1.description: I have read and agree to all terms and conditions of the User Service Agreement.

consent2.title: Privacy Policy
consent2.description: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy, understanding how my personal information will be collected and used.

consent3.title: Marketing Communications
consent3.description: I agree to receive marketing communications about products, services, and promotions. (Optional)

verification.documentsDescription: Please upload clear photos of your documents to complete identity verification.

documentTypes.idFrontDesc: Please upload a clear photo of the front of your ID
documentTypes.idBackDesc: Please upload a clear photo of the back of your ID
documentTypes.addressProofDesc: Please upload a utility bill or bank statement from the last 3 months

documentUpload.requirement1: Must be a valid and unexpired ID
documentUpload.requirement2: Must contain your full name, photo, and date of birth
documentUpload.requirement3: Please provide copies of both sides of your ID, except for passport (only signature page required)
documentUpload.addressRequirement1: Must contain your name and residential address
documentUpload.addressRequirement2: Must be issued by a government or tax office within the past 12 months, or by a financial institution or utility provider within the past 3 months
documentUpload.uploadLaterNote: *If you don't have the required documents ready, you can return later to upload them

verification.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, PDF format, max 20MB

errors.agreementRequired: Please agree to the required agreements

complete.successDescription: Your application has been successfully submitted, please wait patiently for approval!
complete.pendingDescription: We are reviewing your documents. This usually takes 1-3 business days. We will notify you by email once the review is complete.
complete.approvedDescription: Congratulations! Your account has been verified and you now have access to full trading features.
complete.rejectedDescription: Sorry, your verification documents did not pass the review. Please check the rejection reason and resubmit.

error.networkError: Network error, please check your connection
